sentence: 多学一门语言的边际效益在递减。
pinyin: Duō xué yī mén yǔyán de biānjì xiàoyì zài dìjiǎn.
english: The marginal benefit of learning one more language is diminishing.

meaning: 1. to give an interview; 2. to be interviewed; 3. to respond to (quest
sentence: 她受访时谈到了自己的创业经历。
pinyin: Tā shòufǎng shí tándào le zìjǐ de chuàngyè jīnglì.
english: When she gave the interview, she talked about her entrepreneurial experience.

meaning: 1. to scheme together; 2. to conspire; 3. joint plan; 4. conspiracy
sentence: 两人共谋策划了这次活动。
pinyin: Liǎng rén gòngmóu cèhuà le zhè cì huódòng.
english: The two of them planned this event together.

sentence: 他向迟到的客人致歉。
pinyin: Tā xiàng chídào de kèrén zhìqiàn.
english: He apologized to the guests for being late.

sentence: 她对星相学很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā duì xīngxiàng xué hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: She is very interested in astrology.

sentence: 他从小就患有癫痫，需要定期服药。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù huàn yǒu diānxián, xūyào dìngqī fúyào.
english: He has had epilepsy since childhood and needs to take medication regularly.

sentence: 她每周在学校教课三天。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu zài xuéxiào jiāokè sān tiān.
english: She teaches class at school three days a week.

sentence: 两国正式复交后，贸易往来也增加了。
pinyin: Liǎng guó zhèngshì fù jiāo hòu, màoyì wǎnglái yě zēngjiā le.
english: After the two countries officially resumed diplomatic relations, trade between them also increased.

meaning: by means of; through; with the help of
sentence: 她借着窗边的灯光看书。
pinyin: Tā jiè zhe chuāng biān de dēngguāng kàn shū.
english: She read by the light coming through the window.

sentence: 历史课讲到了清末立宪的过程。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dào le Qīng mò lì xiàn de guòchéng.
english: The history class covered the process of establishing a constitution at the end of the Qing dynasty.

meaning: (math.) postulate; public facilities (abbr. for 公共設施|公共设施[gong1 gong4
sentence: 这条公设是几何学的基础。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo gōng shè shì jǐhéxué de jīchǔ.
english: This postulate is the foundation of geometry.

meaning: the number of showings of a movie, play etc; screening; performance
sentence: 这部电影今天有三个场次可以选。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jīntiān yǒu sān gè chǎngcì kěyǐ xuǎn.
english: This movie has three screenings today to choose from.

meaning: school of engineering; college of engineering
sentence: 他在工学院学习机械工程专业。
pinyin: Tā zài gōngxuéyuàn xuéxí jīxiè gōngchéng zhuānyè.
english: He studies mechanical engineering at the college of engineering.

meaning: to sum up; a roundup; a general narrative
sentence: 会议结束后，他写了一篇综述。
pinyin: Huìyì jiéshù hòu, tā xiěle yī piān zōngshù.
english: After the conference, he wrote a summary review.

sentence: 这条铁路线是跨省的大工程。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo tiělù xiàn shì kuà shěng de dà gōngchéng.
english: This railway line is a major interprovincial project.

sentence: 完成这个项目需要大约五十个工时。
pinyin: Wánchéng zhège xiàngmù xūyào dàyuē wǔshí gè gōngshí.
english: Completing this project requires about fifty man-hours.

sentence: 他不辜负大家的重托，圆满完成了任务。
pinyin: Tā bù gūfù dàjiā de zhòngtuō, yuánmǎn wánchéngle rènwù.
english: He lived up to everyone's great trust and successfully completed the mission.

meaning: to have kept count; to know how many; (fig.) to know exactly how thing
sentence: 这件事我心里有数，你放心吧。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì wǒ xīnlǐ yǒushù, nǐ fàngxīn ba.
english: I know exactly how this matter stands — don't worry.

meaning: to set (the tone, a target etc); to lay down (the beat)
sentence: 我们已经定下了明天出发的计划。
pinyin: Wǒmen yǐjīng dìng xià le míngtiān chūfā de jìhuà.
english: We have already set the plan to depart tomorrow.

meaning: to declare oneself emperor; to win the best actor award
sentence: 他在电影节上凭借这部作品称帝。
pinyin: Tā zài diànyǐng jié shàng píngjiè zhè bù zuòpǐn chēngdì.
english: He won the best actor award at the film festival with this work.

meaning: comfort woman (woman or girl forced into sex slavery by the Japanese m
sentence: 慰安妇是二战中遭受苦难的历史见证。
pinyin: Wèiānfù shì Èr Zhàn zhōng zāoshòu kǔnàn de lìshǐ jiànzhèng.
english: Comfort women are historical witnesses to the suffering endured during World War II.

meaning: to fill in and submit (a form)
sentence: 请在截止日期前填报志愿表格。
pinyin: Qǐng zài jiézhǐ rìqī qián tiánbào zhìyuàn biǎogé.
english: Please fill in and submit the preference form before the deadline.

sentence: 请把活动的联络人姓名发给我。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ huódòng de liánluòrén xìngmíng fā gěi wǒ.
english: Please send me the name of the contact person for the event.

meaning: to state; to declare; pronouncement; declaration
sentence: 他公开声言将继续坚持自己的立场。
pinyin: Tā gōngkāi shēngyán jiāng jìxù jiānchí zìjǐ de lìchǎng.
english: He publicly declared that he would continue to hold his position.

sentence: 政府为了修路开始征地。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ wèile xiū lù kāishǐ zhēngdì.
english: The government began requisitioning land to build a road.

sentence: 双方经过协商，达致了共同协议。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng jīngguò xiéshāng, dázhìle gòngtóng xiéyì.
english: After negotiation, both sides attained a mutual agreement.

sentence: 她唱起了家乡的山歌，声音很美。
pinyin: Tā chàng qǐ le jiāxiāng de shāngē, shēngyīn hěn měi.
english: She sang a folk song from her hometown in a beautiful voice.

sentence: 公司聘请了专业人士处理财税问题。
pinyin: Gōngsī pìnqǐngle zhuānyè rénshì chǔlǐ cáishuì wèntí.
english: The company hired professionals to handle finance and taxation issues.

meaning: to originate; to initiate; beginning; origin
sentence: 这场改革发端于二十年前的一次会议。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng gǎigé fāduān yú èrshí nián qián de yī cì huìyì.
english: This reform originated from a meeting twenty years ago.

sentence: 该地区将在下月举行补选。
pinyin: Gāi dìqū jiāng zài xià yuè jǔxíng bǔxuǎn.
english: A by-election will be held in the region next month.

meaning: end of month; late in the month
sentence: 月末要记得交房租。
pinyin: Yuè mò yào jìde jiāo fángzū.
english: Remember to pay the rent at the end of the month.

sentence: 他的情史很复杂，朋友都不清楚。
pinyin: Tā de qíngshǐ hěn fùzá, péngyou dōu bù qīngchǔ.
english: His romantic history is quite complicated — even his friends don't know the details.

sentence: 客厅墙上挂着几幅书画。
pinyin: Kètīng qiáng shàng guàzhe jǐ fú shūhuà.
english: Several pieces of calligraphy and painting hang on the living room wall.

sentence: 他升职后职级提高了一级。
pinyin: Tā shēngzhí hòu zhíjí tígāole yī jí.
english: After his promotion, his job grade went up one level.

sentence: 这家小店只收现款，不能刷卡。
pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎo diàn zhǐ shōu xiànkuǎn, bù néng shuā kǎ.
english: This small shop only accepts cash — no card payments.

meaning: to expire; to run out; to come to an end
sentence: 合同期满后，他选择不续签了。
pinyin: Hétong qīmǎn hòu, tā xuǎnzé bù xù qiān le.
english: After the contract expired, he chose not to renew it.

sentence: 农业集体化改变了农村的生产方式。
pinyin: Nóngyè jítǐhuà gǎibiànle nóngcūn de shēngchǎn fāngshì.
english: Agricultural collectivization changed the way production was organized in rural areas.

sentence: 航展期间每天有数十架次飞机表演。
pinyin: Háng zhǎn qījiān měitiān yǒu shùshí jià cì fēijī biǎoyǎn.
english: During the air show, dozens of sorties performed every day.

sentence: 准妈妈要注意补充叶酸和铁。
pinyin: Zhǔn māma yào zhùyì bǔchōng yèsuān hé tiě.
english: Mothers-to-be should pay attention to getting enough folic acid and iron.

sentence: 遇到突发情况要保持镇定。
pinyin: Yùdào tūfā qíngkuàng yào bǎochí zhèndìng.
english: Stay calm when you encounter an unexpected situation.

meaning: have a reunion; reunite as a family
sentence: 中秋节是一家人团圆的日子。
pinyin: Zhōngqiūjié shì yì jiā rén tuányuán de rìzi.
english: Mid-Autumn Festival is a day for the whole family to reunite.

sentence: 老板要求把这份方案精简到两页。
pinyin: Lǎobǎn yāoqiú bǎ zhè fèn fāng'àn jīngjiǎn dào liǎng yè.
english: The boss asked for this proposal to be trimmed down to two pages.

sentence: 她听到孩子哭声，急忙跑了过去。
pinyin: Tā tīng dào háizi kū shēng, jímáng pǎole guòqù.
english: Hearing the child cry, she hurried over.

sentence: 她穿了件很醒目的红色外套。
pinyin: Tā chuān le jiàn hěn xǐngmù de hóngsè wàitào.
english: She wore a very eye-catching red jacket.

sentence: 他今天系了一条深蓝色的领带。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān jì le yī tiáo shēnlánsè de lǐngdài.
english: He wore a dark blue necktie today.

sentence: 大家都希望国家越来越富强。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu xīwàng guójiā yuè lái yuè fùqiáng.
english: Everyone hopes the country becomes more and more prosperous and strong.

sentence: 普通话有四个声调，初学者容易搞混。
pinyin: Pǔtōnghuà yǒu sì gè shēngdiào, chūxuézhě róngyì gǎohùn.
english: Mandarin has four tones, which beginners often confuse.

sentence: 他喜欢发短信，不喜欢打电话。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān fā duǎnxìn, bù xǐhuān dǎ diànhuà.
english: He likes to send text messages rather than make phone calls.

sentence: 她站在门口向我们挥手告别。
pinyin: Tā zhàn zài ménkǒu xiàng wǒmen huīshǒu gàobié.
english: She stood at the doorway waving goodbye to us.

sentence: 路由器放远了信号就会变弱。
pinyin: Lùyóuqì fàng yuǎn le xìnhào jiù huì biàn ruò.
english: If the router is placed too far away, the signal will weaken.
